title: Flaky Spicy Pul Biber Stir-fry
description: A show-off Slovakian dish featuring pul biber (a spicy pepper spread), raw-friendly and flaky in texture.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix Pul Biber with a bit of water to create a thin paste.
Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add rice vermicelli and cook until they start to brown and release moisture, about 2-3 minutes.
Deglaze the pan with some cooking oil, then add garlic and green onions for a few seconds until fragrant.
Add Pul Biber paste, red bell pepper slices, and enough water to cover the ingredients. Stir well to combine.
Simmer gently for about 5-7 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly and the vermicelli are fully cooked.
Fold in toasted sesame seeds and adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
